title: RC7291 GST/HST and QST Annual Information Return for Selected Listed Financial Institutions - Canada.ca
content:
## RC7291 GST/HST and QST Annual Information Return for Selected Listed Financial Institutions
You must download the accessible fillable PDF to your computer. Use Acrobat Reader 10 or later to open the file. Do not click the link to open it in your web browser.
- Download and save the PDF to your computer
- Open the downloaded PDF in Acrobat Reader 10 or later
You have to fill out this form if you are a selected listed financial institution (SLFI) for GST/HST or QST purposes or both that is a registrant for GST/HST and QST purposes and is a reporting institution under subsection 273.2(2) of the Excise Tax Act (ETA) or under section 350.0.2 of the Act respecting the Québec sales tax (ARQST) or both.

## Ways to get the form
- Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader You must download and open fillable PDFs in Acrobat Reader 10 or higher. Accessible Fillable PDF (rc7291-fill-23e.pdf) Previous years: Accessible Fillable PDFs This form is also available for the years listed below: 2021 – Fillable PDF (rc7291-fill-21e.pdf) 2018 – Fillable PDF (rc7291-fill-18e.pdf) 2016 – Fillable PDF (rc7291-fill-16e.pdf) 2014 – Fillable PDF (rc7291-fill-14e.pdf)

### Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader
You must download and open fillable PDFs in Acrobat Reader 10 or higher.
- Accessible Fillable PDF (rc7291-fill-23e.pdf)
This form is also available for the years listed below:
- 2021 – Fillable PDF (rc7291-fill-21e.pdf)
- 2018 – Fillable PDF (rc7291-fill-18e.pdf)
- 2016 – Fillable PDF (rc7291-fill-16e.pdf)
- 2014 – Fillable PDF (rc7291-fill-14e.pdf)
- Print and fill out by hand Standard print PDF (rc7291-23e.pdf) Previous years: Standard print PDFs This form is also available for the years listed below: 2021 – Standard print PDF (rc7291-21e.pdf) 2018 – Standard print PDF (rc7291-18e.pdf) 2016 – Standard print PDF (rc7291-16e.pdf) 2014 – Standard print PDF (rc7291-14e.pdf)

### Print and fill out by hand
- Standard print PDF (rc7291-23e.pdf)
This form is also available for the years listed below:
- 2021 – Standard print PDF (rc7291-21e.pdf)
- 2018 – Standard print PDF (rc7291-18e.pdf)
- 2016 – Standard print PDF (rc7291-16e.pdf)
- 2014 – Standard print PDF (rc7291-14e.pdf)
- Ask for an alternate format You can order alternate formats such as digital audio, electronic text, braille, and large print. Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities

### Ask for an alternate format
You can order alternate formats such as digital audio, electronic text, braille, and large print.
- Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
